home.heroTitle: The Definitive Christian Theology Study Platform

defend.title: Defend the Faith
defend.subtitle: Philosophical, scientific, and historical arguments for Christianity

cosmological.name: Cosmological Arguments
cosmological.desc: From the existence of the universe to a necessary first cause

ontological.name: Ontological Arguments
ontological.desc: From the very concept of God to the reality of His existence

teleological.name: Teleological Arguments
teleological.desc: From the order and fine-tuning of the universe to intelligent design

moral.name: Moral Arguments
moral.desc: From the existence of objective moral values to a moral lawgiver

existential.name: Existential Arguments
existential.desc: From consciousness, desire, and meaning to a transcendent source

historical.name: Historical Evidence
historical.desc: From manuscript evidence, eyewitness testimony, and the Resurrection

objections.name: Atheist Objections
objections.desc: Responses to the problem of evil, divine hiddenness, and more

compare.subtitle: Understand the theological foundations of Christianity's major branches
